description: afl-utils is a collection of utilities for working with AFL (American Fuzzy Lop) fuzz results.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/afl-utils && python3 afl-utils.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/afl-utils && python3 afl-utils.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/afl-utils && python3 afl-utils.py --help`. Helper for AFL (American Fuzzy Lop) runs.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the exploit category. Fits when the engagement needs: Helper for AFL (American Fuzzy Lop) runs.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Helper for AFL (American Fuzzy Lop) runs.
